title: Belt Refinery: Assay-Calibration Prefix-Cache Ordering
strategies: identity / arbitrary global order (reference baseline, scores ~0.1)
marginal-frequency order: place the most-frequently-required assay stage first so its calibration is reused by the most probes
correlation-aware order that keeps co-occurring stage clusters contiguous so whole latent mining profiles share a long cached prefix
local search (swap / insertion moves with multi-restart) over the global ordering to squeeze out the remaining distinct trie nodes
